title: Custom Patches for Clothing Brands: A B2B Buying Guide
excerpt: What apparel brands need to know about patch types, minimum order quantities, backing options and artwork preparation for custom patch projects.
seoTitle: Custom Patches for Clothing Brands: A B2B Buying Guide | KaKa Patches
seoDescription: Complete B2B buying guide for clothing brands sourcing custom embroidered, woven, PVC and chenille patches. MOQ, backing options, artwork tips and production timelines.
content:
## Why Clothing Brands Choose Custom Patches

Custom patches add distinctive branding to apparel products. Whether you are a streetwear label, fashion brand or accessories line, patches offer a tactile premium alternative to screen printing.

## Patch Types for Apparel

### Woven Patches for Labels

Woven patches are ideal for clothing labels and brand tags. Their smooth flat surface captures fine text and intricate logos cleanly.

### Embroidered Patches for Heritage Look

Embroidered patches add classic stitched texture to denim jackets, caps and outerwear. The raised threads communicate quality and tradition.

### PVC Patches for Streetwear

PVC patches offer a bold modern look perfect for streetwear collections, bags and headwear with their 3D rubber effect.

### Chenille Patches for Statement Pieces

Chenille patches create standout designs with their soft fuzzy texture — perfect for fashion-forward collections and varsity-inspired pieces.

## Production Considerations

- **Minimum Order Quantity:** 100 pieces per design
- **Lead Time:** 2-3 weeks typical
- **Backing Options:** Sew-on, iron-on, Velcro, adhesive
- **Artwork:** Vector files preferred (AI, EPS, PDF)

## Getting Started

Upload your artwork through our Request a Quote page. Provide patch type, size, backing preference and quantity. Our team will prepare a factory-direct quote.
